name: CI Systems (Israel) Ltd.
summary: CI Systems (Israel) Ltd. develops, manufactures, and markets electro-optical precision test and measurement equipment worldwide. The company offers various electro-optical test systems, including SWIR camera, FLIR camera, day camera, laser testing systems, detector testing systems, and boresight testing systems; missile warning system testers; optical alignment testers; and integrating sphere systems. It also offers blackbody radiation sources consisting of extended area and cavity black bodies, RAD motorized target wheel, and accessories; and aperture collimators and wide field of view collimators. In addition, the company manufactures and sells infrared radiometric products, such as multi-channel radiometers, multi-spectral radiometers, dual-band fast radiometer, background discrimination radiometers, and solar-blind imaging radiometer for remote sensing applications. Further, it designs and manufactures optical gas imaging solutions for the defense and security markets. Additionally, the company provides optical monitoring equipment consisting of noncontact temperature monitors and liquid monitoring systems for wafers and photovoltaic solar cell manufacturing. The company was founded in 1977 and is based in Migdal Ha'Emek, Israel. CI Systems (Israel) Ltd. is a subsidiary of CI Technologies Inc.
